name: Age-related frailty plasmapheresis registry remains unknown status with no posted results
summary: NCT05054894 remains unknown status with estimated 2025 completion and no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT05054894 as unknown status with 100 estimated participants, estimated 2025 completion, and no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 100 estimated; result status is not posted.
caveats: No-results registry status is not evidence of benefit.
Frailty endpoints would matter for aging claims if controlled results are later published.
The current public read should not treat this registry as positive evidence.
